goal: Complete codebase cleanup — delete dead code, unused files, stale references, and outdated patterns across the entire repo

risks: Deleting the Codex platform adapter prematurely — it is exported from platform/index.ts barrel and codex-cli-spawn.ts has tests. Foreman only uses ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter, but removing the Codex adapter changes the public platform API. Need to verify no external consumers before deleting.

Parallel deletion across domains risks merge conflicts — if frontend cleanup and server cleanup both touch shared type files (server/types.ts, src/stores/types.ts), one branch will conflict with the other.
Incomplete deletion leaving broken imports — removing a file without tracing all its import sites will break tsc --noEmit. Each project must run type-check as its final verification.
over_engineering_flags: Tempting to also refactor or restructure while cleaning — the directive correctly says deletion only. No restructuring.
Could over-scope by auditing every file line-by-line when the brainstorm already identified most targets. Use the known targets as the primary list, then do a tsc/build sweep to catch anything else.
challenges.recommendation: Proceed as-is. The domain decomposition from the brainstorm is sound. The key simplification: use tsc --noEmit and vite build as the source of truth for what is actually dead, rather than manual line-by-line audit. Delete known targets first, then let the compiler tell you what else broke or is orphaned.

projects.title: Delete dead scripts, fix config, update gitignore
projects.scope_summary: Delete intelligence-trends.ts/.js/.d.ts, codex-proof.ts, find-gids.ts from scripts/. Remove cmdk from package.json dependencies (zero imports in src/). Add dist-cli/ and dist-server/ to .gitignore. Fix zod transitive dep in work-item-types.ts (either add zod to package.json or remove the import). Remove unused tsconfig paths/includes referencing deleted files. Verify with tsc --noEmit.

projects.title: Delete Codex platform adapter and dead server code
projects.scope_summary: Delete server/platform/codex-cli-spawn.ts and its test file. Remove CodexCLISpawnAdapter export from server/platform/index.ts. Verify foreman.ts and server/index.ts still compile (they use ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter only). Delete scripts/spawn-agent.ts if orphaned. Check for and remove any dead exports in server/types.ts, dead functions in server state/aggregator, and stale watchers. Verify with tsc --noEmit.

projects.title: Delete dead frontend components, hooks, and UI primitives
projects.scope_summary: The git status shows ~40 deleted frontend files already staged (dashboard/, org/, projects/, sessions/, teams/, shared/, ui/ components, hooks/useNotifications.ts). Verify these deletions are complete — no remaining imports referencing deleted files. Check src/components/game/panels/ for orphaned panels (OpsPanel.tsx already deleted per git status). Remove any dead re-exports from barrel index files. Clean up src/router.tsx routes pointing to deleted pages. Remove unused UI primitives from src/components/ui/. Verify with vite build + tsc --noEmit.

projects.title: Reconcile type drift between server/types.ts and src/stores/types.ts
projects.scope_summary: Audit server/types.ts and src/stores/types.ts for types that reference deleted features (goals, categories, dashboard pages, old pipeline steps). Remove dead type definitions and interfaces that no longer have consumers. Check server/state/work-item-types.ts for stale types. This is deletion of dead types only — no restructuring. Verify both server and client compile after changes.

projects.title: Clean up MCP server dead code and public/ stale assets
projects.scope_summary: Audit mcp-server/tools/ for references to deleted concepts (goals, categories, old dashboard types). Remove dead tool handlers or dead branches within tools. In public/, remove tracked Tiled .tsx files and .tiled-project/.tiled-session. Delete scripts/personality-compiler.ts if orphaned. Verify with tsc --noEmit and vite build.
